title: Moar Diamond Swords
description: The Moar Diamond Swords datapack adds a bunch of new diamond sword types to the game. The goal is to have swords that are more interesting than Netherite Swords and fill that Late/End game hole of boring items.
body:
Moar Diamond Swords

The Moar Diamond Swords datapack adds a bunch of new diamond sword types to the game. The goal is to have swords that are more interesting than Netherite Swords and fill that Late/End game hole of boring items. This pack relied on the Moar Diamonds datapack for all the crafting components. Moar Swords also needs to be installed for this datapack to work.

You can craft them in the Vanilla Crafting Table. All recipes can all be found HERE, or in-game in the Recipe Guide

The datapack REQUIRES this Library, as well as this Resource Pack.

Moar Swords must be installed for this pack to work!

Moar Diamonds must be installed to Craft any of the Swords!
Learn more from this video:

So, what do the swords do?

  • Experience Sword:
    • It can pull experience out of mobs that have yet to die. It can only do this once per mob. This allows you to get more XP from your farms.

  • XP Star Sword:
    • Drops loads of XP on your first hit of a mob.

  • Ender Diamond Sword:
    • Right-Click to Teleport forward a decent distance. Cannot teleport you through blocks. Also can be used as a decent sword, but can’t be enchanted. Unbreakable.

  • Rainbow Sword:
    • Pretty colors. This sword has the ability to cause mobs to drop a random dye. However, a mob can only drop one dye per die. So, one dye per mob.

  • Invisible Sword:
    • Doesn’t show up in third person.

  • Darkness Sword:
    • Deals more damage the darker the location.

  • Light Sword:
    • Deals more damage the brighter the location you are in.

  • Vampire Sword:
    • Heals the user when hitting mobs. Causes bleeding on them, but burns and damages the user if used in sunlight.
